titleStmt.title: SII 24.105: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 105. (A.R. No. 20 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Records a sale of land, to the Śrīvaishṇavas by Śēndaṉ Śivaṉ and another. The inscription is dated in the 45th year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyīṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayir muṉaik kontaḷa varaicar tantaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip poṟpari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit teṉṟicai temarukamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum nannilappāvaiyun taṉimaiyun tavirntu punitaṟ tirumaṇi makuṭa muṟaimayiṟ cūṭi
tanna maṉuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Iru nila viḷākam Eṅkaṇun tanātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāttikaḻa Orutani meruvil puḻiviḷaiyāṭa vār kaṭaṟṟivāntarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭutanta kalañcorikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karuntalai paruntalait tiṭat tan pon nakarp puṟattiṭaik kiṭappap piṟkulap piṟai pol niṟpiḻai yeṉnum col letir koṭiṟṟallatu tankai vil
leti maṇalūr naṭuveṉattuṅkapattiraiyaḷavum Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭa tan mānamum kūṟina viramum kiṭappa Ēṟiṉa malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa viḻunta natikaḷum cuḻaṉṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭal kaḷun talaivirittalamara kuṭaticait taṉṉāṭukantu tāṉaiyum pala nāḷiṭṭa pala pala mutukum payan tetir māṟina jayap peruntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷeriroṇkaṇ maṭantaiyariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyum
kaṅka koṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷa varu parittaraṅkamum poru parikkalaṅka ḷum porukarittaraṅkamum tantiravāriyu muṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal paṭarvatu polat tan peruñceṉai yevip pañcavaraiyvarum poruta porkkaḷattañci veru neḷittoṭi Araṇenappukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭip paṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vaṉacararākki pocca veñcura meṟṟi koṟṟa vi
tamiṭpotiyamu matta veṅkari paṭu mayyaṟcayya muṅkaṉṉiyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭi kuṭamalai nāṭṭetirnta cāveṟellām tanivicum peṟa māveṟiya tan varutaniṟṟalaivarai kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟi toṟu nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟaikoḷārat tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum
tiruppa ḻiyum Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīrasiṅhāsanattu vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesaripanmarāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kolottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 5 Āvatu pāṇṭi kulācani vaḷanāṭṭu Iṭaiyāṟṟu nāṭṭu brahmadeyam Iṭaiyāṟṟumaṅkalattu kīran catayan centan civanum ṭṭanum Ivviruvom
śrī vaiṣṇavarkku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkoṭutta nilamāvatu
śrī vaiṣṇavakkaṇakku Āttiraiyan paṭṭanum Ippaṭikku kākavum Itu ve poruḷ mā Āvatākavum Itu vallatu volai kāṭṭakkaṭavānallātānākavum koṇṭu
tirumokūrpiccarkkum Uḷḷiṭṭa śrīvaiṣṇavarkku Āttiraiyan centan civanum Innilam Ulakuyyavaṉta coḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Innam par nāṭṭu brammadeyam śrī parāntaka caruppetimaṅkalattu nārāyaṇa Eḻuttu
neṟ Ivai En Eḻuttu Āttiraiyan centan śrī ka ḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟi kūr ppan tāyayirān paṭṭanen Ivai Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ivvūr cava
nārāyaṇan Irākavapaṭṭa comayāciyen Amutupaṭṭanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven Āttiraiyan śrīkraṣṇavaḷavanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ivvūr Ampaṭṭan tiruvaraṅka tevan
Digital edition of SII 24.105 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
